title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
summary: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

title: Marc Andreessen dismisses AI layoff fears; Elon Musk says work will be optional in the future
summary: AI layoffs: Referencing the Lump of Labor Fallacy, Andreessen argued that fears of AI-driven job scarcity are rooted in a flawed assumption that the amount of work in an economy is fixed. title: What is the WTO ecommerce moratorium: Everything you need to know
